notes: v1.14.92 - Redesign fix: the #mode-toggle (Command/Work/Ref strip) was inside <main>, but .page is position:absolute;inset:0 so the active page (pg-cmd) overlaid the in-flow toggle and its first row (#cc-statusrow) collided with it. Moved #mode-toggle OUT of <main> to persistent chrome - a sibling immediately before <main>, same model as .search-wrap (flex-shrink:0). Now main flexes below the toggle and the absolute page layers fill main beneath it: no overlap, for Command/Work/Ref alike. DOM-position move only (JS references the toggle by id, inert to the move); no CSS change; field app untouched (toggle stays display:none with the flag off).
